main.quote: Welcome to the Sailor's Rest, Captain. Take a load off — what'll it be?

options.label: I'll buy a round for the house.

news.quote: The weather's been foul off the western capes. Two coasters limped back into Harberg last week with snapped masts. Captains are paying handsome for safe crews.

news_more.quote: Customs at Ostervik have been turning over every grain sack. Word is someone tried to slip contraband through. Wouldn't go that way if you're carrying anything... interesting.

rumours.quote: Old Sigrid swears she saw a square-rigger near Vargnes flying no colours. Probably nothing. Probably.
